history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A split-screen, low-angle, close-up, selfie-style photograph of a young man with dark, styled hair, taken in a photo booth application. The man is shirtless, revealing his shoulders and neck, and is holding a smartphone in his right hand to capture the image. The phone case is adorned with a colorful, possibly cartoonish, design featuring characters and patterns. He is looking into the phone's screen, with his profile visible, showing his sharp jawline and ear. The background is a solid, textured purple, creating a somewhat retro or digital aesthetic. The lighting is soft and appears to be coming from the front, highlighting the contours of his face and body. The overall mood is casual and youthful, with a slightly moody or introspective feel due to the subdued lighting and the self-taken nature of the photo. The image has a distinct halftone dot pattern overlay, giving it a vintage print or digital glitch effect. The top of the frame shows the text "Photo Booth" in a simple, sans-serif font. The bottom of the frame shows a circular icon resembling a camera shutter and a button labeled "Effects." The image is composed of two identical frames stacked vertically, suggesting a diptych or a screen capture from a photo booth application.
